name: Jetwell Computer Co., Ltd.
summary: Jetwell Computer Co., Ltd. provides IT infrastructure and integration services in Taiwan. The company offers computer system products, including servers, workstations, notebooks, pads, and printer systems; and storage and big data integration services, as well as designs, builds, integrates, and sells thin client systems. It also provides network products, such as firewall and intrusion detection systems, building green IDC, switch hubs, routers, network interface cards, and wireless network products, as well as international system management and planning and digital surveillance systems. In addition, the company offers security software, file and database audit software, anti-virus, anti-hacker, SPAM, VM ware, and back-up software; building private cloud; and BYOD solutions, as well as integrates and sells encrypting file system and file management software. Further, it provides various professional services comprising maintenance contract, on-site maintenance, IT consultation, project management, and cloud rental and security services. Jetwell Computer Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
